sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي أَحْمَدُ سَاعَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed provodi jedan sat svaki dan na društvenim mrežama.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad spends an hour every day on social media sites.

sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ صُوَرَهُ الْجَمِيلَةَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ وَعَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: On dijeli svoje lijepe fotografije sa svojim prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: He shares his beautiful photos with his friends and family.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ تَعْلِيقَاتٍ لَطِيفَةً عَلَى مَنْشُورَاتِ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: On piše lijepe komentare na objave drugih ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: He writes kind comments on other people's posts.
